channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Austrian far-right leader's efforts to form a new government collapse
item.description: VIENNA (AP) — Austrian far-right leader Herbert Kickl said Wednesday that his talks on forming a coalition government with a conservative party have collapsed. Austria’s president gave Kickl a mandate to try to form a new government on Jan.
item.dc:creator: STEPHANIE LIECHTENSTEIN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Monty the giant schnauzer wins Westminster dog show
item.description: After coming close in the last two years, Monty the giant schnauzer won the top prize at the Westminster Kennel Club dog show Tuesday night, leaving handler and co-owner Katie Bernardin almost too emotional to speak.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Peltz, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Snow and freezing rain cause crashes in Virginia while California prepares for likely flooding
item.description: Heavy snow and freezing rain caused hundreds of traffic crashes in Virginia and left tens of thousands of residents in the dark as the central Appalachians and parts of the mid-Atlantic states braced for heavy rains on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: BEN FINLEY and JOHN RABY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Education report reveals which states have seen biggest drops in reading, math scores
item.description: While some schools are starting to claw back some of the ground lost due to pandemic-era learning disruptions, but there's still a ways to go, a new report finds.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Kremlin says unidentified Russian freed in US in exchange for Moscow's release of Marc Fogel
item.description: MOSCOW (AP) — The Kremlin said Wednesday that a Russian citizen was freed in the United States in exchange for Moscow’s release of American Marc Fogel, but refused to identify him until he arrives in Russia.
item.dc:creator: VLADIMIR ISACHENKOV, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ozzy Osbourne's 'final show' with original Black Sabbath: What we know
item.description: The performance, called "The Back to the Beginning," will cap off an all-day event featuring sets from several iconic heavy metal acts.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Langenfeld, Fox 5

item.title: Republican lawmakers urge Trump to respect federal court rulings
item.description: GOP lawmakers are growing increasingly worried about the nation plunging into a constitutional crisis if Trump ignores court orders halting his most aggressive actions.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, ABC 4

item.title: Disney, amid changes to DEI initiatives, will alter content warning ahead of 'Peter Pan,' 'Dumbo' and other older films
item.description: Disney has become the latest company to change its diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI) initiatives as pressure from the federal government to eliminate such programs continues.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, ABC 4

item.title: Misty Copeland's new picture story, 'Bunheads, Act 2,' will be out in September
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Misty Copeland is ready to take young readers on another imaginary trip to the ballet. The celebrated principal dancer with the American Ballet Theatre has a follow-up planned to her best-selling picture book, “Bunheads.” On Sept.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jack the Ripper's identity revealed after DNA match, historian says
item.description: A historian believes he has determined Jack the Ripper's identity through a DNA match of a shawl found at the scene of one of his murders.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Cause of deadly Arizona plane crash revealed, deceased pilot identified
item.description: A landing gear failure caused the private jet owned by Vince Neil – the lead singer of Mötley Crüe – to crash into a parked private jet on Monday, killing its 78-year-old co-pilot.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Monty the giant schnauzer wins Westminster dog show
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — This time, the giant schnauzer went the full Monty. After coming close in the last two years, Monty the giant schnauzer won the top prize at the Westminster Kennel Club dog show Tuesday night, leaving handler and co-owner Katie Bernardin almost too emotional to speak.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER PELTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: When does a heartbeat start? South Carolina Supreme Court again takes up abortion issue
item.description: Lawyers for South Carolina and Planned Parenthood are returning to the state’s highest court to argue how restrictive the state's abortion ban should be.
item.dc:creator: Jeffrey Collins, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Musk appears at White House defending DOGE's work but acknowledging mistakes
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump's most powerful adviser, Elon Musk, made a rare public appearance at the White House on Tuesday to defend the swift and extensive cuts he's pushing across the federal government while acknowledging there have been mistakes and will be more.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN and MICHELLE L. PRICE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Storm makes for treacherous travel as snow and ice track through the mid-Atlantic
item.description: A snowstorm blew into the mid-Atlantic states Tuesday, causing dozens of accidents on icy roads, prompting school closures and stoking worries about possible power outages. The heaviest snowfall — up to 10 inches (25 centimeters) — was expected in parts of Virginia and West Virginia.
item.dc:creator: BEN FINLEY and JOHN RABY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Flu activity now highest in 15 years: See which states have it worst
item.description: Influenza cases continue to mount with the virus reaching activity levels in the U.S. not seen for the last 15 years, according to the Centers from Disease Control and Prevention.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, KRON4

item.title: Trump tariffs rattle small business owners already dealing with tight margins
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — President Donald Trump's continued roll out of a wide array of tariffs is rattling small business owners already dealing with tight profit margins. Trump on Monday announced a 25% tariff on steel and aluminum and promised more import duties to come.
item.dc:creator: MAE ANDERSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Senate Republicans vow action to boost border funds after briefing with Trump officials
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Citing warnings from President Donald Trump's border czar, Senate Republicans vowed Tuesday to move quickly on a budget plan that could pave the way for the passage of about $340 billion in additional border security and defense spending.
item.dc:creator: KEVIN FREKING and LISA MASCARO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Papa John's debuts bath bomb inspired by its signature garlic sauce
item.description: Papa John’s is giving its fans a new way to enjoy its signature garlic sauce this Valentine’s Day. On Tuesday, the pizza chain announced that they created a limited-edition bath bomb inspired by the famous sauce that comes with every pizza order.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: In rare case, Georgia father jailed after his son was accused of a school shooting is granted bond
item.description: A judge has granted a $500,000 bond for the father of a 14-year-old boy who is accused of a deadly mass shooting at a Georgia high school.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Martin, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: New York City's mayor has 4 months to persuade Democratic voters he's not Trump's puppet
item.description: New York City Mayor Eric Adams declared Tuesday that he is “no longer facing legal questions” after the Justice Department moved to shield him from the bribery charges that have been hanging over his reelection campaign.
item.dc:creator: ANTHONY IZAGUIRRE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Canned tuna sold at major grocers recalled due to food poisoning risk
item.description: LOS ANGELES (KTLA) - Several brands of canned tuna sold at major stores, including Trader Joe's, Costco, and H-E-B, have been recalled due to possible contamination. Tri-Union Seafoods, based in El Segundo, California, announced the recall last week.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Ex-49er Dana Stubblefield freed from prison after rape conviction overturned
item.description: A judge has granted the release of former San Francisco 49er Dana Stubblefield after his 2020 rape conviction was vacated by a California appeals court last December.
item.dc:creator: JAIMIE DING, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Firefighters battle inferno after reported explosion near Texas airport, 7 injured
item.description: Texas firefighters are battling a large fire near El Paso International Airport after a reported explosion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A pilot on a private jet owned by Mötley Crüe singer killed in Arizona aircraft collision
item.description: SCOTTSDALE, Ariz. (AP) — One of two pilots on a private jet owned by Mötley Crüe singer Vince Neil died after the aircraft veered off a runway in Arizona and hit a business jet, according to a Federal Aviation Administration incident report.
item.dc:creator: SEJAL GOVINDARAO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Thousands of tickets issued in Rhode Island over dark window tint
item.description: Massachusetts and Connecticut allow vehicle window tints to be significantly darker than Rhode Island does.
item.dc:creator: Tim White, NewsNation

item.title: Disney to change content warning for 'Peter Pan,' 'Dumbo,' other older films in broader DEI shift
item.description: LOS ANGELES (KTLA) – Disney has become the latest company to change its policies involving diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI) amid pressure from the federal government to eliminate such programs.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: Karen Read loses double jeopardy appeal in Boston cop slaying case, will receive new trial
item.description: Massachusetts Supreme Court denies Karen Read's bid to have murder charges thrown out on grounds of double jeopardy in murder of police officer boyfriend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump ally Steve Bannon pleads guilty and avoids jail time in border wall fraud case
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Steve Bannon pleaded guilty on Tuesday to defrauding donors to a private effort to build a wall on the U.S. southern border, ending a case the conservative strategist decried as a “political persecution.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Punk rock pioneer battling stage 4 cancer and brain tumor; family asks for help
item.description: His family is holding a fundraiser to help pay for a nurse, physical therapy, and "day-to-day vital living expenses.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump seeks to expand his influence over arts and culture with Kennedy Center moves
item.description: After dominating U.S. politics for nearly a decade, President Trump now appears to be setting his sights on the country’s cultural landscape.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: What the Westminster show dogs' names mean
item.description: They have names that could make a random password generator cry uncle. Meet, for example, GCHG CH Calicops Sassafras Gonnakikurass. “She’s a saucy girl. Her name says it all,” Fred Ortiz said as he groomed the Brussels griffon to compete Monday at the Westminster Kennel Club dog show.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER PELTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump tells Treasury Department to stop making pennies
item.description: President Trump claims he has instructed the U.S. Treasury Department to stop producing pennies, calling the 1-cent coin wasteful.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: Eagles beat Chiefs 40-22 in lopsided Super Bowl LIX
item.description: The Kansas City Chiefs wanted to make history with three back-to-back-to-back championships, but Super Bowl LIX was dominated by the Philadelphia Eagles, who won the game 40-22.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: Photos: President Trump arrives at Super Bowl LIX in New Orleans
item.description: In addition to the history that may be made on the field, the U.S. will see a first during Super Bowl LIX: a sitting president will be in attendance.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: US Marine from California identified as one of 4 people killed in Philippines plane crash
item.description: CAMP PENDLETON, Calif. (AP) — A U.S. Marine from California was identified by military officials Sunday as one of four people killed when a plane contracted by the U.S. military crashed in a rice field in the southern Philippines. Sgt. Jacob M.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Musk says he has no plans to buy TikTok
item.description: Despite ByteDance stating that they are not planning to sell, some investors have shown interest in buying the company.
item.dc:creator: Ailia Zehra, Fox 5
